title: Show-Off Portuguese Apple Bread
description: A low-carb friendly, silky, and bitter Portuguese dough bread recipe topped with applesauce for an extra crunchy twist.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the almond flour, coconut sugar, and yeast.
Add the grated cheddar cheese, melted butter, apple cider vinegar, and xanthan gum. Mix well.
Crack in the eggs and mix until a dough forms.
Gradually add the warm water and mix until the dough becomes silky and smooth.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Punch down the dough and shape it into a round loaf.
Place the loaf on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush the top of the loaf with melted butter.
Bake the bread for 30-35 minutes or until it's golden brown.
Let the bread cool for 10 minutes before slicing and topping with applesauce.
